introduction: Yellowish green discoloration of the skin or sclera (at Serum bilirubin 2-4mg/dl). Jaundice is not a disease condition. It is either a symptom or a sign.

features: Diseases of the liver and the biliary tract
Conditions that cause excessive red cells haemolysis: infections, haemoglobinopathies

drug: Colestyramine: 3 - 6 g orally 6 hourly in severe obstructive jaundice
Phenobarbital in neonatal jaundice: 5-8 mg/kg orally daily
